title: Proof selection dynamic routing review
scope: Review whether proof selection should reason from proof types, target repo capabilities, setup/adopt-discovered routes, and manual verification fallbacks before selecting concrete commands.
goal: Shape a dynamic proof-selection model that starts from proof intent, enriches from target repo capabilities, and only then emits concrete commands or manual verification instructions.
non_goals: Do not prescribe this source repo's Makefile targets or no-absolute-path policy to host repos.
Do not implement the full proof-selection redesign in the review pass.

review_mode.review question: How should proof selection represent general proof types, target capability discovery, setup/adopt learned routes, command selection, and manual verification fallbacks without leaking repo-local assumptions?

review_method.commands used: uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json --select planning_record,active_contract,resumable_contract,todo,planning_surface_health; rg -n proof/test-workspace/lint-workspace in src and tests; inspect proof_selection_rules.json and proof CLI tests.
review_method.evidence sources: Target-repo report about unavailable Makefile targets, target-repo report about repo-local absolute-path policy leakage, current proof-selection rules/default lanes, existing Makefile adaptation tests, and config assurance proof profiles.

references.label: Proof selection selected Make targets absent from host repo

findings.title: Proof selection needs a proof-intent layer before command selection
findings.summary: Changed paths should first map to proof kinds such as executable proof, surface check, diff review, or manual verification rather than directly to repo-specific commands.
findings.evidence: The existing lane table already carries proof_kind and enough_proof fields, but compact proof output did not expose the proof-type reasoning that explains why a command or review route was selected.
findings.risk_if_unchanged: Agents see only a command list and can mistake package-local defaults for target-repo obligations.
findings.recommendation: Expose a proof_strategy object in proof output and keep command emission downstream of proof-kind selection.

findings.title: Executable proof commands must be gated by target capabilities
findings.summary: Host repos must not receive Makefile commands unless the target actually exposes the needed targets or a discovered equivalent.
findings.evidence: Dogfooding target report showed proof selected make test-workspace and make lint-workspace in a repo whose Makefile did not define those targets.
findings.risk_if_unchanged: Proof selection sends agents into failed command loops and implies Agentic Workspace owns host-repo proof policy.
findings.recommendation: Report target_proof_capabilities and adapt only to discovered Makefile targets or package.json scripts.

findings.title: Unavailable executable proof needs explicit manual verification fallback
findings.summary: When no satisfactory command can be selected, proof output should say so and give the agent concrete manual verification instructions.
findings.evidence: The target report's command failures were not enough to tell the agent what proof should replace them.
findings.risk_if_unchanged: Agents either over-test with irrelevant commands or close work with ambiguous proof.
findings.recommendation: Emit manual_verification when selected proof commands are unavailable or no required command is discovered.

recommendation.promote: Promoted the three review findings into the first implementation slice: proof_strategy, target_proof_capabilities, package.json script adaptation, and manual_verification fallback.
recommendation.defer: Persisted route maps learned during setup/adopt remain future work; this slice performs live target discovery at proof-selection time.

retention.proof surface: routed issues, planning state, docs, checks, Memory, or a compact retained review stub

review_finding.rule: Use only these headings when a prose finding is needed; keep the canonical fields structured.

field_map.Next owner: execution_summary/follow-on routed to or required_continuation/owner surface

handoff_or_closeout.rule: Prefer structured fields; use this shape only for short human-readable summaries.

validation_commands: uv run ruff check src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_proof_cli.py tests/test_workspace_implement_cli.py
drift_log: 2026-05-11: Review completed and promoted into the first bounded proof-selection implementation slice.
